name: Service Bus DLQ Overflow
failure_mode: Compensating actions not registered. DLQ accumulates unhandled messages beyond maxDeliveryCount.
detection: DLQ depth alert in Azure Monitor. gate_dlq_drain_health fails (all_handled=False).
remediation: 1. Register compensating actions via CompensatingActionRunner. 2. Run verify_webhook_reliability.py to drain DLQ. 3. Investigate root cause of message failures.
